title: Memorial Corridor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Memorial Corridor''' was a corridor just outside the [[Grand Convocation Chamber]] of the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] was once walking along the corridor when her bodyguards, [[the Shooter]] and [[the Sniffer]], rushed her behind a column when suspicious of the surroundings.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
